head: b66468204196daa0b8e0f991fd8b8a0e7d061239

resetDecision.summary: Move from pages-that-share-tokens to one unified platform system: shared section grammar, one OfferSurface component family (5 layout variants over one state machine), and a measured logo-slot system. Homepage is reconceived as the platform front door; the plain-list/flag-grid direction is abandoned.
preserved: top hero offer block + bottom compact offer block (exchange review principle)
evidence / eligibility boundaries (canonical MI decides; design renders decided state)
CBW token palette and typography (navy/amber/green/gray, Inter + Barlow Condensed)
restricted/unknown states never receive claim/registration/affiliate-style CTAs
reset: homepage composition (no plain list, no flag-grid country browsing)
site-wide section design language (kicker/h2/support grammar, band system)
logo-slot fitting system (measured content-box fit, AR classes, fill targets)
page-family visual variance (reduced to controlled variants of one system)

offerSurfaceFamily.stateMachine: single shared implementation; variants are layout-only

logoSlotDiagnosis.method: opaque-pixel content box measured per asset; fill% = visible content area / usable well area (current 92x30)
rootCauses: transparent canvas padding (worst: bingx-wordmark.png loses 29.5% height; 55.9% fill)
one-size contain-fit across content aspect ratios 2.89-7.60 (binance 61.2% fill at AR 4.96; mexc-dark 40.3% at AR 7.60)
logoSlotDiagnosis.fixSummary: per-asset registry + AR classes (COMPACT <3.5 / WIDE 3.5-5.0 / ULTRA_WIDE >5.0) with height-first normalization, tighter slots (side padding 8->6px), 62-95% fill band + 14px height floor gates, lockup fallback, 5 slot sizes (XL/L/M/S/LOCKUP), no stretching/clipping/recoloring, repository assets only

sectionOrder: S1 platform hero (navy) with country intelligence control
S2 primary commercial area: Top-ranking RANKING_ROW list (first-screen compliant)
S3 how CBW works / verification system band (navy-tint)
S4 browse by country: region-grouped, text-first, no flag grid
S7 restricted or under review (separated; informational actions only)
S9 conversion recap (navy; permitted states only)
homepageV2.firstScreen: desktop Top-3 / mobile Top-2 fully commercial incl. 56px header; V1 validated budgets are the baseline gate (worst-case 681/700 at 320x700)

implementationSequence: CBW-DESIGN-FOUNDATION-PROTOTYPE-001 (logo-slot system v2 + OfferSurface family + section grammar + specimen page)
boundaries: design worktree only; source master untouched; no production, merge or deploy
mock data only; inert CTAs; no /go/**; no live affiliate navigation
no canonical or staging MI binding

ownerDecisions.homepagePrototypeV1Disposition: uncommitted historical visual evidence only; not deleted, not modified
ownerDecisions.exchangeReviewAlignment: to be aligned to the unified V2 foundation later; not automatically the final site visual design
ownerDecisions.foundationGate: no page-family V2 prototype may become the new design authority before the foundation specimen is owner-reviewed
logoSlotRequiredPrinciples: fit measured opaque content rather than transparent canvas bounds
lockup fallback where a raw wordmark cannot satisfy the slot
ownerDecisions.offerSurfaceVarianceRule: layout may vary; facts and authorization logic may not vary
siteWideVisualSystemApproved: green only for authorized commercial actions
neutral gray for unknown and under-review
no oversized promotional cards that break first-screen conversion

futureEnvironmentCreationRule: the future worktree and branch must be created only by the next task, not before
nextFoundationTaskBoundary: start from the committed unified reset direction
build an isolated noindex foundation specimen
remain uncommitted until owner visual review
